title.ko: 선택(스위치, 계전기, 셀렉터 H01H; 무선통신망 H04W)
title.en: SELECTING (switches, relays, selectors H01H; wireless communication networks H04W)

definition.ko: 선택 배치 일반; 선로에 의한 것; 무선 또는 유도링크에 의한 것; 다중화 H04Q3/00; 5/00; 7/00; 11/00 원격제어 또는 원격계측 H04Q9/00 세부 H04Q1/00

title.ko: 장치 또는 배치 선택의 세부 사항
title.en: Details of selecting apparatus or arrangements
Constructional details
Frames or mounting racks for selector switches; Accessories therefor, e.g. frame cover
Cable ducts or mountings specially adapted for exchange installations
Frames or mounting racks for relays; Accessories therefor
Exchange station construction
Arrangements of multiple bars with or without pivotable frames
Distribution frames
Wiring arrangements for selector switches or relays in frames
Electrical details
Testing circuits or apparatus; Circuits or apparatus for detecting, indicating, or signalling faults or troubles
Automatic arrangements
for connection devices
for signalling trouble in unoccupied sub-exchanges
Current-supply circuits or arrangements for selection equipment at exchanges

title.ko: 신호 장치; 신호 전류의 조작 (호출 또는 감시 신호를 제공하는 다중 시스템 H04J1/14, H04J3/12)

using trains of DC pulses (H04Q0001390000 takes precedence)
Impulse regenerators with mechanical or other non-electrical marking arrangements
Pulse-correcting arrangements, e.g. for reducing effects due to interference
using combinations of direct currents of different amplitudes or polarities over line conductors or combination of line conductors
using coded pulse groups
whereby duration of pulse or interval between two pulses is variable
involving the position of a pulse in a cycle

with out-of-voice band signalling frequencies
with voice-band signalling frequencies

with conversion of a single frequency signal into a digital signal
using multi-frequency signalling (H04Q0001460000 takes precedence)
in which m-out-of-n signalling frequencies are transmitted
with conversion of multi-frequency signals into digital signals
comprising means for distinguishing between a signalling current of predetermined frequency and a complex current containing that frequency, e.g. speech current
Induced-current signalling arrangements
Conversion between different kinds of signals
Amplifier switched-on automatically in dependence on automatically selected lines
Balancing circuitry switched-on automatically in dependence on automatically selected lines
Selecting arrangements (H04Q0005000000-H04Q0011000000 take precedence)
Circuit arrangements for selectors responsive to a permutation code
Circuit arrangements for receivers of routing digits
for group or trunk group selectors
for local or long-distance selectors

for line selectors providing transfer of routing digits
for two-way operation selectors
for marking-switches

for line finders
comprising common calling and disconnecting circuit
comprising main groups and subgroups
Selector finders, i.e. allotters
Circuit arrangements for second or subsequent stages of hunting switching
for the second preselection stage
for the second line-finder stage
for stages after the group-selector stage
for stages after the line selector, e.g. for extension selector
Circuit arrangements for indirect selecting controlled by common circuits, e.g. register controller, marker
using revertive control
using signals other than revertive impulses
using translators
using markers
for end-to-end marking
for routing connecting paths
using static devices in switching stages, e.g. electronic switching arrangements
in which the logic circuitry controlling the exchange is centralised
using a stored program
using wired logic circuitry
being comprised by electro-magnetic devices
in which the control signals are multiplexed
Arrangements providing connection between main exchange and sub-exchange or satellite
for connecting to satellites or concentrators which connect one or more exchange lines with a group of local lines
for connecting to private branch exchanges

Traffic distributors

title.ko: 호출 또는 피호가입자 정보의 임시저장 (전신통신에서 중간축적수단은 H04L 13/08)
title.en: Temporary storage of information of calling or called subscriber (intermediate storage means for telegraphic communication H04L0013080000)

title.ko: 2개 이상의 가입자국이 교환기에 동일한 회선으로 연결되는 선택 장치
title.en: Selecting arrangements wherein two or more subscriber stations are connected by the same line to the exchange

title.ko: 모든 가입자를 위한 직접 연결이 있는 것, 즉. 파티라인 시스템 (H04Q5/24가 우선)
title.en: with direct connection for all subscribers, i.e. party-line system (H04Q0005240000 takes precedence)
Signalling by currents in one or other or both line wires or additional wires

Signalling by continuous AC
using single frequencies for different subscribers
using combinations of frequencies

the subordinate centre not permitting interconnection of subscribers connected thereto
for two-party-line systems

Arrangements in telecontrol or telemetry systems for selectively calling a substation from a main station, in which substation desired apparatus is selected for applying a control signal thereto or for obtaining measured values therefrom

Arrangements for synchronous operation

Calling by using continuous AC
using single different frequencies
using combinations of frequencies
Calling by using pulses
